title: Abz New Texture Pack
description: I decided to update my current pack since it is incredibly dated. I have changed a lot of stuff from it.
body: I have changed a lot of things from my old pack. Removed a lot of the standing out purple stuff and switched it to a much darker GUI. No more purple hearts and appleskin bar, no more purple golden apples, but this time a purple enchanted golden apple so that it is easier to spot (especially in pvp). The shield texture is better since the A is gone and replaced with a moon. And make sure to run into the iron golem. Download to know whats left :).![Lowfire, Smaller potion effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb60e0813d84f053c16b5b8b357e764a1db5fc2c.png)![Better Shield texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0341ef5c9caf298a01000cc4059317301c6cced4.png)
